name: Hill Mari (Western Mari)
notes: Hill Mari / Western Mari (кырык мары), Mari El, Russia. STUB: the grapheme inventory is NOT yet specified. Written in a 34-letter Cyrillic alphabet (Russian letters plus Ӓ, Ӧ, Ӱ, Ӹ) with vowel harmony. The values of the two reduced vowels <ы> and <ӹ> and the extent of semi-palatalisation could not be established with confidence from a citable letter-to-phoneme table, so no grapheme map is claimed rather than guessing.
